original_abstract: *International Higher Education* (IHE) provides evidence-based, high-quality commentary and analysis on the critical trends and emerging challenges facing global higher education systems, institutions, and stakeholders.
humanized_abstract: International Higher Education (IHE) offers in-depth, evidence-based analysis and comment on the significant trends, developments and issues facing higher education around the world — in its systems, institutions and communities.

document.output: International Higher Education (IHE) offers in-depth, evidence-based analysis and comment on the significant trends, developments and issues facing higher education around the world — in its systems, institutions and communities.
document.input: *International Higher Education* (IHE) provides evidence-based, high-quality commentary and analysis on the critical trends and emerging challenges facing global higher education systems, institutions, and stakeholders.
